input.background: We calculate $90 \%$ and $95 \%$ confidence intervals for the $R R$ for the estrogen trial illustrative data. Table $\mathbf{17.3}$ shows the data. We established that $\widehat{R R}=\frac{\hat{p}_1}{\hat{p}_2}=\frac{0.08829}{0.07689}=1.1483$.
input.question: Determine the $95 \%$ confidence interval for $\ln R R$ and convert it to the confidence interval for $R R$.

meta_info.caption: Confidence interval for the relative risk (Estrogen  trial).
